description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.13` extracts the redeclared RPC interfaces, `executeAsync`
lambdas, and DOM assertion helpers from per-spec copies into one
canonical module. Without this expand step every spec migration
would have to invent the canonical surface independently.

## What to build

`e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` exporting the canonical typed-RPC
interfaces, the `executeAsync` lambdas, and the row/visibility DOM
helpers used by all four WebDriver specs.

## Technical Approach

- Create `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts`.
- Re-export `WorkspaceSwitchResponse` and `WorkspaceStateResponse`
  from `src/rpc/bindings.ts` where possible; otherwise redeclare
  them with one canonical shape.
- Implement and export:
  - `invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch(candidatePath: string)` with a
    canonical `arguments_: object` typed signature.
  - `invokeWorkspaceState()` with the same canonical signature.
  - `issueRowSelector(title: string): string` for the DOM
    selector.
  - `expectIssueVisible(title: string)` that locates the row and
    asserts presence with a clear error message.
- Document each helper's contract in a short JSDoc block.
- Do not import the helper from any spec yet тАФ that is the
  migrate sub-issues' job.

## Considerations

- The typed signatures must match the generated TauRPC binding
  types in `src/rpc/bindings.ts`.
- Do not include sidebar helpers (`expectSidebarWorkspacePath`,
  `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent`) in this module тАФ those live in
  `bsm-kia.14`'s `helpers/sidebar.ts` to keep the modules
  cohesive.
- Pick one canonical `arguments_: object` typed signature (not
  `Record<string, unknown>` drift).
- Keep pure helpers unit-testable (no WebdriverIO dependency in
  `issueRowSelector` if possible тАФ just a string formatter).

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` exports the canonical types
      and helpers listed above.
- [ ] No spec imports the new module yet (this is the expand step).
- [ ] `pnpm exec ultracite check`, `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit`, and
      `pnpm test` all pass.
- [ ] Existing `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` still pass with no
      behavioral change.

## Test Plan

- Add a Vitest unit test file
  (`e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.test.ts`) that verifies:
  - `issueRowSelector(title)` produces the expected CSS / XPath
    string for representative titles.
  - Any pure formatter helper (e.g., title escaping) returns the
    expected value.
- Run `pnpm test`, `pnpm exec ultracite check`, and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` to prove no regression.
title: Expand: create e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts
